description: Style NoteThese shoes from woodland celebrate the true spirit of adventure and are designed for comfort under extreme conditions.Product Detailscasual shoes with stitch detailing at the seams Five-hole lace ups with metal eyeletsPadded tongue and insole for in-step comfortPull loop at the heelTPU outsole with geometric lugs and grooves, reinforced onto the upper at the toe box, curved midfoot and a raised heelMaterial and CareNubuckUse a branded leather conditioner and polish on leather partsUse a suede brush to remove dist from suede partsDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
